{{CargoOrgan
|name=Horn of Fate
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10686
|idx=44
|description="When the sky is shrouded and the sun devoured, only the Horn of Fate can pierce the veil of time and space…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=Summon Horn of Fate, dealing DMG equal to 181.6% of ATK, and trigger an explosion to deal DMG equal to 20.4% of ATK!
|hp=1868
|def=179
|atk=303
|rush=176
|gene1=Per organ awakened, {race} ATK +7
Organs awakened: 40/40
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} ATK +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=Earth DMG +90
|gene4=Per Altar God Descent, {race} HP +70
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene5=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +15%
|gene7=For Round 1, CRIT DMG +15% (Awakened)
|}}
